Patch Set 2: Code-Review-2

Seen following issues in testing:
1. 
- Set an input value to a TOSCA function and Save
- Change the input value to a value and Save
- Open the input again and the TOSCA function is displayed rather than the new value (even though the new value is shown in the genertaed TOSCA

2. 
- An an input of complex type where one of the properties of the complex type has a default
- Set the value of the input to a TOSCA function
- The TOSCA function value for the property as a whole is generated but also the default value for the sub property is generated

Patch Set 2:

also, export/import is not working correctly
Patch Set 3: Patch Set 2 was rebased

Patch Set 9:

If I create a service and add multiple instances of the same VFC to it, and set the operation input values differently for each instance. Then export and import - the operation input values on all the VFC instances are created the same in the new service when they should be different.
